{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Flying sword
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Flying swords are controlled by [[scripts]] and guided by wind [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
